title: doronicum × willdenowii
intro: Doronicum × willdenowii is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between Doronicum plantagineum and Doronicum pardalianches. It is also known as leopard's bane, and its medicinal properties are attributed to its flowers and leaves, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Doronicum × willdenowii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Doronicum × willdenowii include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
